title: App Store Connect: point ReShoot at consolidated legal URLs
description: In App Store Connect for ReShoot, set Privacy Policy URL to https://37.technology/legal/privacy and Terms/EULA link to https://37.technology/legal/terms (both now cover all Thirty Seven apps). Consider setting the marketing URL to https://37.technology/reshoot.
notes: 2026-07-05 Codex: ReShoot had no editable version, so created 1.0.3 f9a7dc04-bae5-40bc-86af-989aedcf92ff in Prepare for Submission by copying metadata from 1.0.2. en-US localization verified with marketingUrl/supportUrl set to https://37.technology/reshoot.
close_reason: ReShoot editable version created and marketing/support URLs updated and verified.

title: ColorCub: colorcub.app is UNREGISTERED; fix App Store listing exposure
description: Investigated 2026-07-05: the .app registry (Charleston Road Registry RDAP) reports colorcub.app as NOT REGISTERED — no record we ever bought it (or it fully lapsed). DNS is NXDOMAIN; colorcub.web.app / colorcub.firebaseapp.com show Firebase 'Site Not Found'. Meanwhile the App Store Connect listing's marketing URL is https://www.colorcub.app — an unregistered domain anyone could buy (~$12/yr) and capture that traffic. Actions: (1) update ASC marketing URL to https://37.technology/colorcub (see the ColorCub ASC task), (2) decide whether to defensively register colorcub.app and 301 it to 37.technology/colorcub, (3) check the Firebase console for any leftover ColorCub hosting project and delete it.
notes: 2026-07-06 Codex update: Decommissioned the production Firebase-hosted ColorCub page by changing colorcub-server firebase.json Hosting from catch-all rewrite to a catch-all temporary 302 redirect to https://37.technology/colorcub. Deployed Hosting-only to Firebase project colorcub-production and verified https://colorcub-production.web.app and /privacy both return 302 Location: https://37.technology/colorcub. Committed/pushed colorcub-server b1776d6. Remaining: colorcub.app is still unregistered/hijackable and live ASC links still need to stop pointing at that domain when ColorCub 1.3.3 ships or via ASC web UI. colorcub-stage was not changed in this pass.

title: App Store Connect: point ColorCub at consolidated legal URLs
description: In App Store Connect for ColorCub, set Privacy Policy URL to https://37.technology/legal/privacy and Terms/EULA link to https://37.technology/legal/terms (both now cover all Thirty Seven apps). Consider setting the marketing URL to https://37.technology/colorcub. Also set the marketing URL to https://37.technology/colorcub — the current sellerUrl (colorcub.app) does not resolve.
notes: 2026-07-05 Codex: ColorCub prepare version 1.3.3 b5d01c92-83be-4761-83e5-e003204b8c07 now has marketingUrl/supportUrl set to https://37.technology/colorcub for all 11 locales. Prepare app-info 0379314b-9049-4d67-b2aa-9b37e9b3bde5 now has privacyPolicyUrl set to https://37.technology/legal/privacy for all 11 locales. Live app-info 92677808-53e5-4b30-833a-194cac0828e0 still shows https://www.colorcub.app/privacy. Second retry: official schema confirms the public writable field is PATCH /v1/appInfoLocalizations/{id} privacyPolicyUrl, but asc app-setup info set against the live app-info en-US localization failed with Apple's current-state error: privacyPolicyUrl can not be modified in the current state. asc web auth status is unauthenticated, and Chrome lands at /login?targetUrl=/apps/6745206164/appstore/info&authResult=FAILED. Remaining action: sign into App Store Connect web UI and update the live ColorCub Privacy Policy URL there, or ship the prepared ColorCub metadata.

comments.author: Cameron Ehrlich
comments.text: 2026-07-06 Codex: pulled colorcub-mobile main, bumped production/stage app target to MARKETING_VERSION 1.3.3 and CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION 14, committed d6a24d4 (Bump ColorCub to 1.3.3 build 14), and pushed to 37-Inc/colorcub-mobile main. Triggered Xcode Cloud Deploy Production on main; run 689030da-b4d3-4106-84cb-f9e154249e09 completed SUCCEEDED. App Store Connect build 14 is VALID (build id c7d9d40b-cc11-4d6a-9d5b-ec973726108b, prerelease 1.3.3) and is now attached to App Store version 1.3.3 b5d01c92-83be-4761-83e5-e003204b8c07. asc validate now reports 0 errors / 0 blocking; remaining pre-submit cleanup is release notes for 11 locales plus manual App Privacy publish-state confirmation.

title: App Store Connect: Stitch It points at its OWN site (special case)
description: Stitch It has its own website, so unlike the other apps it should NOT use the consolidated 37.technology legal URLs for everything. In App Store Connect for Stitch It (Apple ID 554594252): Privacy Policy URL -> https://www.stitchitapp.com/privacy (live, verified 200); Marketing URL -> https://www.stitchitapp.com/; Support URL -> https://www.stitchitapp.com/ (site has no dedicated support page; support email is stitchit@37.technology). stitchitapp.com has NO terms page (/terms is 404), so for any terms/EULA reference use https://37.technology/legal/terms, which explicitly covers Stitch It. Same for Google Play listing links where applicable.

title: Recurring SEO blog posts (weekly or monthly)
description: Add a recurring blog-posting job to help this site's SEO. Each post focuses on a different product, talking about a different problem it solves. Cadence: weekly or monthly, TBD. Messaging to be refined further when we pick this up.

title: Remove /legal/*/faxit redirects once App Store Connect is updated
description: next.config.ts contains permanent redirects from /legal/privacy/faxit and /legal/terms/faxit to the consolidated pages. Once every app's App Store Connect listing points at /legal/privacy and /legal/terms (see dependency tasks), delete the redirects and this becomes a clean URL space.
